ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the implementation */,
  "implementation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the implementation type */,
  "run_time" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "relative_speedup" REAL /* Relative speedup compared to the baseline implementation */,
  "absolute_speedup" REAL /* Absolute speedup value */,
  "gflops" REAL /* Performance in GFLOPS */,
  "percent_of_peak" REAL /* Percentage of peak performance achieved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who submitted the benchmark */,
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the optimization technique used */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was submitted */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm being benchmarked */,
  "hardware_platform" TEXT /* Hardware platform used for the benchmark */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the benchmark entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_hardware_platform FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_platform") REFERENCES hardware_platforms ("platform_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_algorithm_name FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_name") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_optimization_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimization_id") REFERENCES optimization_techniques ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_implementation_id FOREIGN KEY ("implementation_id") REFERENCES implementations ("implementation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "implementations" (
  "implementation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each implementation type */,
  "implementation_name" TEXT /* Name of the implementation (e.g., Python, Java, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the implementation and its context */,
  "performance_overview" TEXT /* Brief overview of the performance characteristics of the implementation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the implementation was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the implementation details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("implementation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the individual submitting benchmarks */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_techniques" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization technique */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization technique used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the optimization entails */,
  "application_scope" TEXT /* Scope or context in which the optimization technique is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the optimization technique was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the optimization technique details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Time or space complexity of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the algorithm was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the algorithm details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware platform */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the hardware platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hardware platform was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hardware platform details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)
